title: Epic Dragon Death Sound Effect Plus
description: Epic sound at dragon's death and more!
body:
This mod is a full-fledged mod version of my Resource Pack, bringing not only its sound design but also **exclusive things** you won’t find in the resourcepack alone. And you should use [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) with [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches) for better experience.

# 🧩 **Dependencies**
• [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

## 🎧 **Original Resourcepack**

► Want the resource pack version?

→ Check out the [original](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/epic-dragon-death-sound-effect)

## ❓ **Ran into a bug or have suggestions? Let me know!**
→ DM me anytime on [Twitter (X)](https://x.com/bbayyt)

→ Still unsure? Watch the preview [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rpxJOar7FXI)
